---
title: "OLS"
author: "Erica"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)
```   

```{r}
#load library
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(glmnet)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(tibble)
library(modelsummary)
```

```{r}
#read in data
file_path = "../data/df_for_shap_analysis.csv"
df = read.csv(file_path) 
```

## ols function to be copied to replace the code block in eval
```{r}
predict_alpha_ols <- function(train_df){
  df <- train_df %>%
    mutate(
      caldt = as.Date(caldt),
      year = year(caldt)
    ) %>%
    arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
    drop_na()

  evaluation_year <- max(df$year)

  train_data <- df %>%
    filter(year < evaluation_year)

  test_data <- df %>%
    filter(year == evaluation_year)

  feature_names <- train_data %>%
    select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
    colnames()

  formula <- as.formula(
    paste("alpha_ann ~", paste(feature_names, collapse = " + "))
  )

  model <- lm(formula, data = train_data) # no hyperparameter tuning is needed for OLS

  preds <- predict(model, newdata = test_data)

  result <- tibble(
    evaluation_year = evaluation_year,
    crsp_fundno = test_data$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha = preds
  )

  return(result)
}
```

## feature importance of OLS
```{r}
# ---------------------------
# PREPROCESS
# ---------------------------
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    caldt = as.Date(caldt),
    year = lubridate::year(caldt)
  ) %>%
  arrange(year, crsp_fundno) %>%
  drop_na()

train_df <- df %>% filter(year <= 2025, year >= 2004)

# ---------------------------
# FIT POOLED OLS
# ---------------------------
df_model <- train_df %>%
  arrange(year, crsp_fundno)

evaluation_year <- max(df_model$year)

train_data <- df_model %>%
  filter(year < evaluation_year)

feature_names <- train_data %>%
  select(-alpha_ann, -crsp_fundno, -caldt, -year) %>%
  colnames()

formula <- as.formula(
  paste("alpha_ann ~", paste(feature_names, collapse = " + "))
)

model <- lm(formula, data = train_data)

# ---------------------------
# CLUSTERED SE TABLE
# ---------------------------
# clustered vcov (FIXED input)
vcov_tw <- vcovCL(
  model,
  cluster = list(train_data$crsp_fundno, train_data$year)
)

# extract coefficients
beta <- coef(model)

# extract clustered SE
se <- sqrt(diag(vcov_tw))

# build dataframe directly
coef_df <- tibble(
  feature = names(beta),
  Estimate = beta,
  Std_Error = se
) %>%
  mutate(
    t_value = Estimate / Std_Error,
    p_value = 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(t_value))),
    sig = case_when(
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.10 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(t_value)))
coef_df

# ---------------------------
# SHAP (OLS = linear SHAP)
# ---------------------------
X_train <- train_data %>%
  select(all_of(feature_names)) %>%
  as.matrix()

coefs <- coef(model)[feature_names]
mu <- colMeans(X_train)

shap_values <- sweep(X_train, 2, mu, "-") %>%
  sweep(2, coefs, "*") %>%
  as.data.frame()

importance_df <- colMeans(abs(shap_values)) %>%
  sort(decreasing = TRUE) %>%
  enframe(name = "feature", value = "importance")

# ---------------------------
# SHAP PLOT
# ---------------------------
ols_featimp_ranking <-
  ggplot(importance_df,
         aes(y = reorder(feature, importance),
             x = importance,
             fill = importance)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "firebrick", high = "dodgerblue4") +
  labs(
    title = "OLS SHAP Ranking",
    y = "",
    x = "Mean (|SHAP|)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

ols_featimp_ranking
#ggsave("../figures/ols_shap_plot.png", width = 16, height = 12)
```

```{r}
# ---------------------------
# COEFFICIENT PLOT
# ---------------------------
plot_df <- plot_df %>%
  mutate(
    sig = case_when(
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.10 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ "Insignificant"
    )
  )
ols_coef_plot <- ggplot(plot_df, 
                        aes(x = Estimate, 
                            y = feature, 
                            color = sig)) +
  
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ci_lower, xmax = ci_upper), 
                 height = 0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "***" = "#1b9e78",
    "*"   = "#d95f02",
    "Insignificant"  = "grey50"
  )) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Pooled OLS Coefficient Plot (Clustered Standard Error)",
    x = "Coefficient Estimate",
    y = "Features",
    color = "Significance"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal()
ols_coef_plot
ggsave("../figures/ols_coef_plot.png", width = 16, height = 12)
```

```{r}
coef_latex <- coef_df %>%
  arrange(desc(abs(t_value))) %>%
  mutate(
    coef_se = sprintf("%.4f (%.4f)%s", Estimate, Std_Error, sig)
  ) %>%
  select(feature, coef_se)
modelsummary(
  list("Pooled OLS" = model),
  vcov = vcov_tw,
  stars = c('*' = .1, '**' = .05, '***' = .01),
  output = "latex"
)
```
